data.vitamins: Vitamin A (retinyl acetate) 7200 IU · Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) 600 IU · Vitamin E (all-rac-alpha-tocopheryl acetate) 140 mg
data.trace: Zinc (chelate of lysine & glutamic acid) 40 mg · Iron (chelate) 32 mg · Manganese (chelate) 4 mg · Copper (chelate) 3.2 mg · Iodine (calcium iodate anhydrous) 0.6 mg

data.v: Beef — complete food for adult dogs
Complete wet food · gently steamed, ready to eat
Cool, dry place, out of direct sunlight

Cold-pressed complete dry food for cats · ready to serve

sections.title: Feeding guide
sections.data: Cold-pressed feeding guide to be confirmed — daily amounts are much lower than the wet range. We will generate an activity-based table once the finished energy is confirmed.

sections.title: Claims & statements
data: Complete food for adult cats — subject to the cat premix delivering feline essentials (taurine, etc.)
Cold-pressed — gently made at low temperature
Rich in fish & naturally occurring omega-3
Fish-based · also contains egg, crustaceans (krill), molluscs (mussel)

sections.title: Notes & sign-off
sections.data: The composition, analytical constituents, additives and claims stated are based on the current approved recipe together with formulation data and laboratory analysis gathered during development. This document is provided for the customer’s internal review and to inform final artwork; approval of on-pack content and label declarations remains the responsibility of the customer. Information is supplied in good faith and believed accurate to the best of our knowledge. This is a CAT food. Analytical constituents are to be completed from laboratory analysis of the finished product. Additives are pending the cat premix specification: whether the product is nutritionally complete for cats depends on that premix delivering feline-essential nutrients — in particular taurine, and appropriate vitamin A, vitamin D and arachidonic acid.
